title: Soybean Production Up in 2018, USDA Reports. Winter Wheat Seedings and Grain Stocks also reported
summary: Cooler than average summer months but a warmer spring kept the 2018 corn harvest just 1 percent below last year’s record harvest. The nation’s soybean yield was up 5 percent from 2017, with planted area down 1 percent from record 2017 acreage, according to the Crop Production 2018 Summary released t...
